item.title: SuperWin 2.3.3
item.description:
SuperWin 2.3.3

  • A beautiful new Graphing Calculator: each function now lives in a live math field that beautifies what you type as you type it — x^2 becomes x², * becomes ·, plus √, π and − — right in the box, with no separate preview line.
  • Type calculus straight into the equation: d/dx(...), deriv(...), int(...), integral(...) and ∫(...)dx graph the result, including nested and mixed expressions (with a numeric antiderivative fallback when there's no closed form).
  • Prettier, smoother plot: a taller anti-aliased canvas, two-tier grid, a hover coordinate trace that snaps to the nearest curve, on-canvas zoom / home controls, and colour-dot legend swatches that show/hide each curve.

item.title: SuperWin 2.3.2
item.description:
SuperWin 2.3.2

  • Seamless updates: SuperWin now updates itself in place (download + restart) — no installer window and no admin rights required.
  • Graphing Calculator + CAS, leveled up: a live pretty-math preview (x², √, ·) under each function, and per-function d/dx, ∫ dx and simplify, plus a numeric definite-integral panel.
  • Always On Top, grouped tools, fixed-size wrapping tiles, and the polished mini-monitor from recent releases.

item.title: SuperWin 2.3.1
item.description:
SuperWin 2.3.1

  • Graphing Calculator, reimagined (Desmos-style): plot multiple colour-coded functions, drag to pan, scroll to zoom, with a labelled grid and axes.
  • Built-in CAS: a symbolic engine evaluates, differentiates (d/dx) and simplifies expressions — hit d/dx on any function to plot its derivative.
  • Always On Top is now a tool: assign a global hotkey (default Ctrl+Win+T) to pin/unpin any focused window above everything else.
  • Quick access tiles keep a fixed size and wrap to new rows instead of stretching.

item.title: SuperWin 2.3.0
item.description:
SuperWin 2.3.0

  • Four new tools: JSON Formatter, GUID Generator, Graphing Calculator (plot f(x) with functions/constants), and Security & Privacy (secure random tokens, a password-strength meter, and one-click clipboard wiping).
  • Tools are now grouped into categories in the navigation pane and on the Home page.
  • Home Quick access tiles snap and fill each row, adapting to the window width.
  • New Always on top option in Settings to pin the window above everything else.

item.title: SuperWin 2.1.4
item.description:
SuperWin 2.1.4

  • Settings: set the clipboard picker hotkey by physically pressing the keys instead of typing them out -- the new combo applies instantly.
  • Diagnostics: live GPU usage and VRAM, plus disk activity and read/write throughput (the same counters Task Manager uses).
  • Polished mini-monitor: CPU, RAM, GPU and Disk as colour-coded icon rows with bold values and slim bars. The window is now DPI-aware and sized to its content, so all four metrics always fit at any display scale.

item.title: SuperWin 2.1.1
item.description:
SuperWin 2.1.1

  • New tools: Password Generator (length, character classes, strength) and Text utilities (case conversion, trimming, counting, and more).
  • Notepad Super: fixed the text/highlight color pickers applying a stray default color the moment they were opened; color now applies reliably to the selection.
  • Notepad Super: the editor keeps its selection active after using a toolbar button, so formatting and typing continue where you left off.
  • Fixed the version number so the auto-updater reports builds correctly.

item.title: SuperWin 2.0.0
item.description:
SuperWin 2.0.0

  • Blended, custom title bar that flows into the app's Mica surface.
  • New Settings page: app theme (light/dark/system), launch-at-sign-in, and clipboard options.
  • Clipboard (formerly Clipboard++): history is now captured process-wide, and the Win+Shift+V quick-picker works — search, pinned items, keyboard navigation, and auto-paste back into your app.
  • New tools: Keep Awake, Hash & Checksum (MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256), Network Info, and Unit Converter.

item.title: SuperWin 1.3.0
item.description:
SuperWin 1.3.0

  • Notepad Super is now a Word-Lite editor: font family & size, bold/italic/underline/strikethrough, text & highlight colors, alignment, bullet/numbered lists, undo/redo, and RTF open/save.
  • New Color Picker tool: full color wheel, hex/RGB with copy, and a screen eyedropper.
  • PowerToys-style dashboard (NavigationView + Mica), app icon, larger default window.
  • Volume Customizer, Clipboard++, and Diagnostics (with always-on-top mini-monitor).
